# Agentic Agency

> We deploy autonomous AI agents to build production-grade software.

## About

Agentic Agency is a software engineering firm based in Copenhagen, Denmark. We use AI agents—primarily Claude—to deliver production-ready software at unprecedented speed.

Our tagline: **Engineering > Prompting**

We don't prototype. We don't demo. We ship real systems to production.

## Founders

- **Daniel Holm Kristensen** — Co-founder, Managing Partner at Manawell Technologies
- **Morten Elk** — Co-founder

## Methodology: ADAPT

**Agentic Development with Artifact Persistence & Testing**

- **A**gentic — AI agents work autonomously on well-defined tasks
- **D**evelopment — Real engineering, production-grade, not prototyping
- **A**rtifact — Every decision, lesson, and context persists
- **P**ersistence — Session continuity through shared context
- **T**esting — Test-gated task completion, no task closes with failing tests

## Services

- Autonomous software development with AI agents
- Production system delivery (not MVPs or demos)
- AI agent orchestration and deployment
- Enterprise software engineering

## Contact

- Website: https://agenticagency.dev
- Email: daniel.holm@agenticagency.dev
- Location: Frederiksberg, Copenhagen, Denmark

## Key Differentiators

1. We deploy agents, not prompts
2. Production-first mentality
3. Test-gated delivery (no failing tests ever shipped)
4. Transparent methodology (ADAPT)
5. Practitioner-to-practitioner engagement
